description: Configure the Drupal Commerce store for a new 'Apparel' product line by setting up the necessary attributes, variation types, and product types. Create a 'Color' product attribute (id: color) with values Black, White, and Navy, and a 'Size' product attribute (id: size) with values S, M, L, and XL. Configure an 'Apparel' product variation type (id: apparel) that utilizes both attributes, and an 'Apparel' product type (id: apparel) that uses the Apparel variation type. Create and publish a product titled 'Urban Electronics Logo Tee' of the Apparel type, including at least four variations with different size/color combinations, each priced at $24.99. Login credentials: admin / Admin1234!.
